rawIntent: Add a pure utility module under src/shared/utils/date with two exported functions: formatIsoDate(date: Date): string and parseIsoDate(s: string): Date | null. No database, no API, no logging. Include unit tests.

successCriteria.description: A utility module exists under src/shared/utils/date with the functions formatIsoDate and parseIsoDate correctly implemented.
Unit tests exist and pass for both formatIsoDate and parseIsoDate functions.
